provenance.prompt: Create one original isolated modular game sprite: a single historically plausible Japanese makibishi caltrop for the existing Yomi no Kage weapon set. Crisp high-detail 16-bit / 32-bit hybrid pixel art, forged dark iron, four asymmetric spikes arranged so one spike always points upward, clear readable side-game three-quarter silhouette, subtle upper-left steel highlight, no magic. Center the complete object with very generous empty margin on a perfectly flat uniform exact chroma-key magenta #ff00ff background. No ground, cast shadow, hand, character, blood, other objects, labels, text, logo, watermark, blur or antialias fringe. Intended to be cut out into one independent transparent projectile/trap PNG.
